summary: Iteration 73 - Oracle System Integration Testing. NEW Oracle Command Center with Supabase PostgreSQL + DeepSeek LLM integration fully tested. Backend: 14/15 tests passed (93%). Frontend: All Oracle UI features working. Supabase connected (green), DeepSeek connected (green). Dashboard shows correct counts: Brain-Notes 10,144, Knowledge 156, Memory 56, AI-Agenten 33, Oracle-Tasks 2,624, Audit-Logs 5,801. Agent invocation with DeepSeek working.

minor.issue: Task creation fails - oracle_ready_queue is a VIEW not a TABLE. Error: 'cannot insert into view oracle_ready_queue'
minor.fix_suggestion: Insert into oracle_tasks table instead, or create INSTEAD OF INSERT trigger on the view

action_items: Fix oracle task creation endpoint - insert into oracle_tasks table instead of oracle_ready_queue view
critical_code_review_comments: supabase_client.py insert_oracle_task() inserts into oracle_ready_queue which is a VIEW - should insert into oracle_tasks table
context_for_next_testing_agent: Oracle System integration fully working. Supabase PostgreSQL connected with 10K+ brain notes, 2.6K tasks, 33 AI agents. DeepSeek LLM working for sub-agent invocation. Only issue: task creation endpoint needs to insert into oracle_tasks table instead of oracle_ready_queue view.
